markets.rules_primary: If Arina Gabriela Vasilescu wins the Encheva vs Vasilescu professional tennis match in the 2026 W50 Stuttgart-Vaihingen Round of 16 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Elly De La Cruz records 1+ stolen bases in Cincinnati vs Milwaukee professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 30, 2026 at 7:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Elly De La Cruz is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Elly De La Cruz starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Elly De La Cruz is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Elly De La Cruz is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Elly De La Cruz: 1+ stolen bases?

markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Nava Elkin vs Arora professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 San Diego Round of 32 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Anya Arora win the Nava Elkin vs Arora: W15 San Diego Round of 32 match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Rafael Devers records 4+ hits in the San Francisco vs Arizona professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 30, 2026 at 9:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Rafael Devers is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Rafael Devers starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Rafael Devers is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Rafael Devers is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Rafael Devers: 4+ hits?
